title: Clean up manual subscriptions and listeners
description: Auto-subscription via $store cleans itself up, but manual subscribe, timers, and listeners must be torn down.
body: Use when you call store.subscribe manually, add an event listener, or start a timer in a component. Do not assume Svelte tears these down for you. Actions: prefer the $store auto-subscription which unsubscribes on destroy; for manual cases capture the returned unsubscribe and call it in onDestroy or an $effect cleanup return; remove listeners and clear intervals the same way. Validation signals include a test that destroying the component stops further callbacks and no leak/duplicate-subscription warning appears. Risk boundary: leaked subscriptions accumulate across navigations in a SvelteKit SPA and cause memory growth and duplicate side effects.
